name: cfn-guard-security-analyzer
description: Analyze the security of any AWS CloudFormation resource or service directly from Claude Code. The /cfn-analyze orchestrator takes a service name, resource type, or docs URL, lists a service's resources, produces a severity-ranked report (description, criticality, recommendation, and why), and generates self-validated cfn-guard rules — plus granular building-block commands (security scan, property deep-dive, guard-rule generation, crawler). No AWS account required: Claude is the model, and the bundled AWS Documentation + AWS IaC MCP servers provide grounded docs reads and cfn-guard validation.
